cards.back: The average value of a dataset or a subset of data
x̄ = (Σxi) / n, where xi is each data point and n is the number of data points
It represents the central tendency of the data, providing insight into the typical value
It is crucial in data analysis as it helps in making decisions, predicting outcomes, and understanding data distributions

cards.front: How to calculate sample mean in a dataset
cards.back: Add up all the values in the dataset, then divide by the total number of values to get the average
